hooks.command: ./scripts/debug/dbg health 2>&1 | sed 's/^/[bab] /' ; ./scripts/debug/dbg errors 8 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/[bab-recent-err] /' || true ; r=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$r/Bloom&Burgle_ChatHistory.md" ]; then sz=$(wc -c < "$r/Bloom&Burgle_ChatHistory.md" | tr -d ' '); kb=$((sz/1024)); echo "[bab-history] transcript ready: $r/Bloom&Burgle_ChatHistory.md (${kb}KB). Query past decisions with: ./scripts/history/sync query \"...\" — see CLAUDE.md."; fi
f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"; case "$f" in *.luau|*.lua) echo "[bab] hint: edited $f — push to live Studio with: ./scripts/debug/dbg sync ${f#*/.claude/worktrees/*/}" ;; esac
r=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -x "$r/scripts/history/sync" ]; then "$r/scripts/history/sync" 2>&1 | sed 's/^/[bab-history] /' || true; fi
